column1: # LABEL — Home/End jump cursor; insert and Delete work mid-buffer.
# Left/Right preserve the Lotus fast-entry idiom (commit-and-move) and are
# Home jumps cursor to 0 (still in LABEL mode).
# Insert at cursor=0: type 'Z' → buffer "Zworld"; cursor advances to 1.
# End jumps cursor to buffer length (6).
# Mid-buffer Delete: Home → 0, Delete drops the leading 'Z'.
# (Left/Right would commit-and-move in LABEL mode, so cursor navigation
# inside the buffer relies on Home/End plus Delete/Backspace here.)
# Commit — label is the resulting string.
